# Bighorn Threads

> Branded apparel, screen printing, embroidery, and company stores for Las Vegas construction companies and trades. Serving general contractors, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, roofing, steel workers, and data center crews across the Las Vegas metro.

## Services
- Screen Printing Las Vegas: https://bighornthreads.com/services/screen-printing-las-vegas/
- Embroidery Las Vegas: https://bighornthreads.com/services/embroidery-las-vegas/
- DTF Printing Las Vegas: https://bighornthreads.com/dtf-printing-las-vegas/
- Rush Orders Las Vegas: https://bighornthreads.com/services/rush-orders-las-vegas/
- Promotional Products Las Vegas: https://bighornthreads.com/promo-products-las-vegas/
- Company Stores: https://bighornthreads.com/company-stores/

## Buyer Guides
- Screen Printing vs Embroidery for Construction Gear: https://bighornthreads.com/blog/screen-printing-vs-embroidery-construction/ — How to choose the right decoration method per garment by durability, cost, and surface type.
- Minimum Order Quantity for Embroidery & Screen Printing: https://bighornthreads.com/blog/minimum-order-quantity-embroidery-screen-printing/ — Why MOQs exist (12-24 pieces typical) and how to get small-batch work done.
- How Much It Costs to Embroider a Polo: https://bighornthreads.com/blog/how-much-to-embroider-a-polo/ — Embroidered polo pricing by stitch count, digitizing fee, and quantity.
- How Much It Costs to Embroider a Shirt: https://bighornthreads.com/blog/how-much-to-embroider-a-shirt/ — The five factors that drive embroidery cost, with all-in per-shirt pricing.
- What Is Embroidery? A Buyer's Guide: https://bighornthreads.com/blog/what-is-embroidery-buyers-guide/ — How the embroidery process works and what makes a logo embroider well.

## Contact
- Phone: 702.904.8923
- Email: info@bighornthreads.com
- Location: Las Vegas, NV
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8am-5pm

## About
Bighorn Threads outfits the companies that build Las Vegas. Minimum orders: 24 pieces screen printing, 12 pieces embroidery. Rush options available -- call for timeline. Pantone-matched inks, digitized logo files held on file for reorders.
